docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JONES, LEDRA AS TO DEFENDANT WHILEY, CHRIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-20-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-17-1998 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WHILEY, CHRIS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, LEDRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WHILEY, CHRIS PLFTS CLAIM FOR PERSONAL INJURY ARISING OUT OF THE COURSE & SCOPE OF HER EMPLOYMENT ARE SUBJECT TO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
